criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issue' in at least one row
- Full Awareness points awarded
If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
For criteria i) to v), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Risks' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
i) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
ii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
iii) At least three of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered' which cover at least three risk types - 0.5 points
(Please note: the risk types appear as headers in the 'Risk types and criteria considered' column.)
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation
- ‘Exclusion of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholders (e.g., informal workers)'
- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- 'Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- ‘Transition to bio-based chemicals'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
iv) At least two of the following selected in column 'Tools and methods used' - 0.5 points
Enterprise Risk Management
-‘COSO Enterprise Risk Management Framework'
-‘Enterprise Risk Management'
-‘ISO 31000 Risk Management'
-‘Risk models'
-‘Stress tests'
International methodologies and standards
-‘Environmental Impact Assessment'
-‘IPCC Climate Change Projections'
-‘ISO 14001 Environmental Management Systems'
-‘ISO 59004 Circular Economy'
-‘Life Cycle Assessment'
-‘PACTA - Paris Agreement Capital Transition Assessment'
Databases
-‘GBIF - Global Biodiversity Information Facility'
-‘IUCN Red List of Ecosystems'
-‘Nation-specific databases, tools, or standards, please specify'
-‘Protected Planet'
-‘Regional government databases, please specify'
Commercially/publicly available tools
-‘BFC - Biodiversity Footprint Calculator'
-‘BFM - Biodiversity Footprint Methodology'
-‘BIM - Biodiversity Impact Metric'
-‘Biological Diversity Protocol'
-‘Bioscope'
-‘BISI - Biodiversity Indicators for Site-based impacts'
-‘BNGC - Biodiversity Net Gain Calculator'
-‘CBD - ‘Convention on Biological Diversity'
-‘CBF - Corporate Biodiversity Footprint'
- ‘Circulytics'
-‘Collect Earth'
-‘EcoVadis'
-‘ENCORE'
-‘IBAT - Integrated Biodiversity Assessment Tool'
-‘LEAP (Locate, Evaluate, Assess and Prepare) approach, TNFD'
-‘ReCiPe'
-‘SEDEX'
-‘WBCSD Corporate Ecosystem Services Review'
-‘WWF Biodiversity Risk Filter'
Other
-‘Desk-based research'
-‘Jurisdictional/landscape assessment'
-‘Materiality assessment'
-‘Partner and stakeholder consultation/analysis'
-‘Scenario analysis'
v) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
For criteria vi) to ix), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
vi) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
vii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
viii) At least two options in column 'Tools and methods used' selected excluding the following - 0.5 points
- 'Other enterprise risk management, please specify'
- 'Internal company methods'
- 'Other international methodologies and standards, please specify'
- 'Other databases, please specify'
- 'Other, please specify'
- 'Other commercially/publicly available tools, please specify'
ix) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
A maximum of 4.5/4.5 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Leadership points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issue' in at least one row
- Full Management points awarded.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
i) 'Dependencies' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process' in any complete row - 0.75 points
ii) 'Impacts' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process' in any complete row - 0.75 points
If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
For criteria iii) to vi), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Risks' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' as follows:
iii) At least seven of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered' which cover all seven risk types - 0.5 points
(Please note: the risk types appear as headers in the 'Risk types and criteria considered' column.)
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation
- ‘Exclusion of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholders (e.g., informal workers)'
- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion'
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- ‘Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
iv) 'Integrated into multi-disciplinary...' selected in column 'Integration of risk management process' - 0.5 points
v) 'Qualitative and quantitative' selected in 'Type of assessment' - 0.5 point
vi) Two of the following selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered' - 0.5 points
- 'Customers'
- 'Employees'
- 'Investors'
- 'Suppliers'
For criterion vii), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' as follows:
vii) 'Qualitative and quantitative' selected in 'Type of assessment' - 0.5 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Columns 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' AND 'Value chain stages covered' must be completed to be eligible for Disclosure points.
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed (excluding columns ‘Have you validated your process for SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess'?' and ‘SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess' official validation letter'). Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 8/8 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
ii) All of the following met in any complete row - 2 points
'Opportunities' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered...' AND
Any option excluding 'Not defined' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' AND
Any option excluding any 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Tools and methods used' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered'.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issue' in at least one row
- Full Awareness points awarded
If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
For criteria i) to v), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Risks' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
i) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
ii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
iii) At least three of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered' which cover at least three risk types - 0.5 points
(Please note: the risk types appear as headers in the 'Risk types and criteria considered' column.)
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation
- ‘Exclusion of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholders (e.g., informal workers)'
- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- 'Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- ‘Transition to bio-based chemicals'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
iv) At least two of the following selected in column 'Tools and methods used' - 0.5 points
Enterprise Risk Management
-‘COSO Enterprise Risk Management Framework'
-‘Enterprise Risk Management'
-‘ISO 31000 Risk Management'
-‘Risk models'
-‘Stress tests'
International methodologies and standards
-‘Environmental Impact Assessment'
-‘IPCC Climate Change Projections'
-‘ISO 14001 Environmental Management Systems'
-‘ISO 59004 Circular Economy'
-‘Life Cycle Assessment'
-‘PACTA - Paris Agreement Capital Transition Assessment'
Databases
-‘GBIF - Global Biodiversity Information Facility'
-‘IUCN Red List of Ecosystems'
-‘Nation-specific databases, tools, or standards, please specify'
-‘Protected Planet'
-‘Regional government databases, please specify'
Commercially/publicly available tools
-‘BFC - Biodiversity Footprint Calculator'
-‘BFM - Biodiversity Footprint Methodology'
-‘BIM - Biodiversity Impact Metric'
-‘Biological Diversity Protocol'
-‘Bioscope'
-‘BISI - Biodiversity Indicators for Site-based impacts'
-‘BNGC - Biodiversity Net Gain Calculator'
-‘CBD - ‘Convention on Biological Diversity'
-‘CBF - Corporate Biodiversity Footprint'
- ‘Circulytics'
-‘Collect Earth'
-‘EcoVadis'
-‘ENCORE'
-‘IBAT - Integrated Biodiversity Assessment Tool'
-‘LEAP (Locate, Evaluate, Assess and Prepare) approach, TNFD'
-‘ReCiPe'
-‘SEDEX'
-‘WBCSD Corporate Ecosystem Services Review'
-‘WWF Biodiversity Risk Filter'
Other
-‘Desk-based research'
-‘Jurisdictional/landscape assessment'
-‘Materiality assessment'
-‘Partner and stakeholder consultation/analysis'
-‘Scenario analysis'
v) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
For criteria vi) to ix), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
vi) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
vii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
viii) At least two options in column 'Tools and methods used' selected excluding the following - 0.5 points
- 'Other enterprise risk management, please specify'
- 'Internal company methods'
- 'Other international methodologies and standards, please specify'
- 'Other databases, please specify'
- 'Other, please specify'
- 'Other commercially/publicly available tools, please specify'
ix) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
A maximum of 4.5/4.5 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
iv) 'Integrated into multi-disciplinary...' selected in column 'Integration of risk management process' - 0.5 points
v) 'Qualitative and quantitative' selected in 'Type of assessment' - 0.5 point
vi) Two of the following selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered' - 0.5 points
- 'Customers'
- 'Employees'
- 'Investors'
- 'Suppliers'
For criterion vii), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' as follows:
vii) 'Qualitative and quantitative' selected in 'Type of assessment' - 0.5 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Columns 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' AND 'Value chain stages covered' must be completed to be eligible for Disclosure points.
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed (excluding columns ‘Have you validated your process for SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess'?' and ‘SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess' official validation letter'). Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 8/8 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. Chronic physical risks

- 'Changing wind patterns'

Technology

v) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
For criteria vi) to ix), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
vi) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
vii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizon(s) covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
viii) At least two options in column 'Tools and methods used' selected excluding the following - 0.5 points
- 'Other enterprise risk management, please specify'
- 'Internal company methods'
- 'Other international methodologies and standards, please specify'
- 'Other databases, please specify'
- 'Other, please specify'
- 'Other commercially/publicly available tools, please specify'
ix) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
A maximum of 4.5/4.5 points is available for this question.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Columns 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' AND 'Value chain stages covered' must be completed to be eligible for Disclosure points.
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed (excluding columns ‘Have you validated your process for SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess'?' and ‘SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess' official validation letter'). Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 8/8 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈': 열 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 are covered by the 프로세스 for this 환경 이슈' 그리고 '가치사슬 stages covered' 완료해야 합니다 to be 획득 가능 for 공시 점. 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 행 공개 (제외 열 ‘Have you validated your 프로세스 for SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess'?' 및 ‘SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess' official validation letter'). 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 8/8점입니다. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Both 'Risks' AND 'Opportunities' must be selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' in any row to be eligible for Awareness points. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
i) All of the following met in any complete row - 2 points
'Risks' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered...' AND
Any option excluding 'Not defined' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' AND
Any option excluding any 'Other, please specify' option selected in column 'Tools and methods used' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered' AND
Any of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered':
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation

- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- ‘Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- ‘Transition to bio-based chemicals'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
ii) All of the following met in any complete row - 2 points
'Opportunities' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered...' AND
Any option excluding 'Not defined' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' AND
Any option excluding any 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Tools and methods used' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered'.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issue' in at least one row
- Full Awareness points awarded
If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
For criteria i) to v), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Risks' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
i) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
ii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
iii) At least three of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered' which cover at least three risk types - 0.5 points
(Please note: the risk types appear as headers in the 'Risk types and criteria considered' column.)
Policy

- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'

- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'

- 'Drought'

v) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points

- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
viii) At least two options in column 'Tools and methods used' selected excluding the following - 0.5 points
- 'Other enterprise risk management, please specify'

- 'Other international methodologies and standards, please specify'
- 'Other databases, please specify'
- 'Other, please specify'

ix) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points

- 'Downstream value chain'

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Leadership points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issue' in at least one row
- Full Management points awarded.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
i) 'Dependencies' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process' in any complete row - 0.75 points
ii) 'Impacts' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process' in any complete row - 0.75 points
If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
For criteria iii) to vi), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Risks' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' as follows:
iii) At least seven of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered' which cover all seven risk types - 0.5 points
(Please note: the risk types appear as headers in the 'Risk types and criteria considered' column.)
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation
- ‘Exclusion of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholders (e.g., informal workers)'
- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion'
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- ‘Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
iv) 'Integrated into multi-disciplinary...' selected in column 'Integration of risk management process' - 0.5 points
v) 'Qualitative and quantitative' selected in 'Type of assessment' - 0.5 point
vi) Two of the following selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered' - 0.5 points
- 'Customers'
- 'Employees'
- 'Investors'
- 'Suppliers'
For criterion vii), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' as follows:
vii) 'Qualitative and quantitative' selected in 'Type of assessment' - 0.5 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Columns 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' AND 'Value chain stages covered' must be completed to be eligible for Disclosure points.
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed (excluding columns ‘Have you validated your process for SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess'?' and ‘SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess' official validation letter'). Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 8/8 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈': 열 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 are covered by the 프로세스 for this 환경 이슈' 그리고 '가치사슬 stages covered' 완료해야 합니다 to be 획득 가능 for 공시 점. 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 행 공개 (제외 열 ‘Have you validated your 프로세스 for SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess'?' 및 ‘SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess' official validation letter'). 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 8/8점입니다. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Both 'Risks' AND 'Opportunities' must be selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' in any row to be eligible for Awareness points. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
i) All of the following met in any complete row - 2 points
'Risks' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered...' AND
Any option excluding 'Not defined' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' AND
Any option excluding any 'Other, please specify' option selected in column 'Tools and methods used' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered' AND
Any of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered':
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation
- ‘Exclusion of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholders (e.g., informal workers)'
- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- ‘Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- ‘Transition to bio-based chemicals'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
ii) All of the following met in any complete row - 2 points
'Opportunities' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered...' AND
Any option excluding 'Not defined' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' AND
Any option excluding any 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Tools and methods used' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered'.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issue' in at least one row
- Full Awareness points awarded
If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
For criteria i) to v), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Risks' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
i) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
ii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
iii) At least three of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered' which cover at least three risk types - 0.5 points
(Please note: the risk types appear as headers in the 'Risk types and criteria considered' column.)
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation
- ‘Exclusion of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholders (e.g., informal workers)'
- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- 'Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- ‘Transition to bio-based chemicals'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
iv) At least two of the following selected in column 'Tools and methods used' - 0.5 points
Enterprise Risk Management
-‘COSO Enterprise Risk Management Framework'
-‘Enterprise Risk Management'
-‘ISO 31000 Risk Management'
-‘Risk models'
-‘Stress tests'
International methodologies and standards
-‘Environmental Impact Assessment'
-‘IPCC Climate Change Projections'
-‘ISO 14001 Environmental Management Systems'
-‘ISO 59004 Circular Economy'
-‘Life Cycle Assessment'
-‘PACTA - Paris Agreement Capital Transition Assessment'
Databases
-‘GBIF - Global Biodiversity Information Facility'
-‘IUCN Red List of Ecosystems'
-‘Nation-specific databases, tools, or standards, please specify'
-‘Protected Planet'
-‘Regional government databases, please specify'
Commercially/publicly available tools
-‘BFC - Biodiversity Footprint Calculator'
-‘BFM - Biodiversity Footprint Methodology'
-‘BIM - Biodiversity Impact Metric'
-‘Biological Diversity Protocol'
-‘Bioscope'
-‘BISI - Biodiversity Indicators for Site-based impacts'
-‘BNGC - Biodiversity Net Gain Calculator'
-‘CBD - ‘Convention on Biological Diversity'
-‘CBF - Corporate Biodiversity Footprint'
- ‘Circulytics'
-‘Collect Earth'
-‘EcoVadis'
-‘ENCORE'
-‘IBAT - Integrated Biodiversity Assessment Tool'
-‘LEAP (Locate, Evaluate, Assess and Prepare) approach, TNFD'
-‘ReCiPe'
-‘SEDEX'
-‘WBCSD Corporate Ecosystem Services Review'
-‘WWF Biodiversity Risk Filter'
Other
-‘Desk-based research'
-‘Jurisdictional/landscape assessment'
-‘Materiality assessment'
-‘Partner and stakeholder consultation/analysis'
-‘Scenario analysis'
v) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
For criteria vi) to ix), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
vi) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
vii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
viii) At least two options in column 'Tools and methods used' selected excluding the following - 0.5 points
- 'Other enterprise risk management, please specify'
- 'Internal company methods'
- 'Other international methodologies and standards, please specify'
- 'Other databases, please specify'
- 'Other, please specify'
- 'Other commercially/publicly available tools, please specify'
ix) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
A maximum of 4.5/4.5 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

0.5 점 - '직접 운영사업장' - '업스트림 가치사슬' - '다운스트림 가치사슬' For 기준 vi) to ix), 점수가 부여됩니다 for a 완성 행 여기서 '기회' is 선택 in 열 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 are covered by the 프로세스...' as follows: vi) Either 'More than once a year' 또는 'Annually' 선택 in 열 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 점 vii) All 의 following 선택 in 열 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 점 - '단기' - '중기' - '장기' viii) 최소 two options in 열 'Tools 및 methods used' 선택 제외 the following - 0.5 점 - 'Other enterprise 리스크 관리, 직접 입력' - 'Internal company methods' - 'Other international methodologies 및 기준, 직접 입력' - 'Other databases, 직접 입력' - 'Other, 직접 입력' - 'Other 상용/공개 도구, 직접 입력' ix) All 의 following 선택 in 열 '가치사슬 stage covered' - 0.5 점 - '직접 운영사업장' - '업스트림 가치사슬' - '다운스트림 가치사슬' A 최고 of 4.5/4.5 점 is available for this 문항. criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Leadership points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issue' in at least one row
- Full Management points awarded.
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
i) 'Dependencies' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process' in any complete row - 0.75 points
ii) 'Impacts' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process' in any complete row - 0.75 points
If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
For criteria iii) to vi), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Risks' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' as follows:
iii) At least seven of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered' which cover all seven risk types - 0.5 points
(Please note: the risk types appear as headers in the 'Risk types and criteria considered' column.)
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation
- ‘Exclusion of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholders (e.g., informal workers)'
- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion'
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- ‘Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
iv) 'Integrated into multi-disciplinary...' selected in column 'Integration of risk management process' - 0.5 points
v) 'Qualitative and quantitative' selected in 'Type of assessment' - 0.5 point
vi) Two of the following selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered' - 0.5 points
- 'Customers'
- 'Employees'
- 'Investors'
- 'Suppliers'
For criterion vii), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' as follows:
vii) 'Qualitative and quantitative' selected in 'Type of assessment' - 0.5 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈': i) 'Dependencies' 선택 in 열 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 are covered by the 프로세스' in 하나 이상 complete 행 - 0.75 점 ii) 'Impacts' 선택 in 열 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 are covered by the 프로세스' in 하나 이상 complete 행 - 0.75 점 만약 '리스크' 및 '기회' are 공개 in the same 행, then all 의 following 기준 해야 합니다 be met in that one 행. 만약 '리스크' 및 '기회' are 공개 in separate 행, then all 의 following 기준 해야 합니다 be met in both 행. criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Columns 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' AND 'Value chain stages covered' must be completed to be eligible for Disclosure points.
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed (excluding columns ‘Have you validated your process for SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess'?' and ‘SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess' official validation letter'). Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 8/8 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

'Uncertainty in market signals' 법적 책임 - 'Exposure to sanctions 및 litigation' - 'Non-compliance with regulations 및 legislation' ii) All 의 following met in 하나 이상 complete 행 - 2 점 '기회' 선택 in 열 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 are covered...' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 'Not defined' 선택 in 열 'Frequency of assessment' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 하나 이상 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Tools 및 methods used' 그리고 하나 이상 option 제외 'Other, 직접 입력' 선택 in 열 'Partners 및 이해관계자 considered'. 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 4/4점입니다. criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issue' in at least one row
- Full Awareness points awarded
If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
For criteria i) to v), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Risks' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
i) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
ii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
iii) At least three of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered' which cover at least three risk types - 0.5 points
(Please note: the risk types appear as headers in the 'Risk types and criteria considered' column.)
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation
- ‘Exclusion of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholders (e.g., informal workers)'
- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- 'Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- ‘Transition to bio-based chemicals'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
iv) At least two of the following selected in column 'Tools and methods used' - 0.5 points
Enterprise Risk Management
-‘COSO Enterprise Risk Management Framework'
-‘Enterprise Risk Management'
-‘ISO 31000 Risk Management'
-‘Risk models'
-‘Stress tests'
International methodologies and standards
-‘Environmental Impact Assessment'
-‘IPCC Climate Change Projections'
-‘ISO 14001 Environmental Management Systems'
-‘ISO 59004 Circular Economy'
-‘Life Cycle Assessment'
-‘PACTA - Paris Agreement Capital Transition Assessment'
Databases
-‘GBIF - Global Biodiversity Information Facility'
-‘IUCN Red List of Ecosystems'
-‘Nation-specific databases, tools, or standards, please specify'
-‘Protected Planet'
-‘Regional government databases, please specify'
Commercially/publicly available tools
-‘BFC - Biodiversity Footprint Calculator'
-‘BFM - Biodiversity Footprint Methodology'
-‘BIM - Biodiversity Impact Metric'
-‘Biological Diversity Protocol'
-‘Bioscope'
-‘BISI - Biodiversity Indicators for Site-based impacts'
-‘BNGC - Biodiversity Net Gain Calculator'
-‘CBD - ‘Convention on Biological Diversity'
-‘CBF - Corporate Biodiversity Footprint'
- ‘Circulytics'
-‘Collect Earth'
-‘EcoVadis'
-‘ENCORE'
-‘IBAT - Integrated Biodiversity Assessment Tool'
-‘LEAP (Locate, Evaluate, Assess and Prepare) approach, TNFD'
-‘ReCiPe'
-‘SEDEX'
-‘WBCSD Corporate Ecosystem Services Review'
-‘WWF Biodiversity Risk Filter'
Other
-‘Desk-based research'
-‘Jurisdictional/landscape assessment'
-‘Materiality assessment'
-‘Partner and stakeholder consultation/analysis'
-‘Scenario analysis'
v) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
For criteria vi) to ix), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
vi) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
vii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
viii) At least two options in column 'Tools and methods used' selected excluding the following - 0.5 points
- 'Other enterprise risk management, please specify'
- 'Internal company methods'
- 'Other international methodologies and standards, please specify'
- 'Other databases, please specify'
- 'Other, please specify'
- 'Other commercially/publicly available tools, please specify'
ix) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
A maximum of 4.5/4.5 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

- 'Changing wind patterns'

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Columns 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process for this environmental issue' AND 'Value chain stages covered' must be completed to be eligible for Disclosure points.
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of rows disclosed (excluding columns ‘Have you validated your process for SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess'?' and ‘SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess' official validation letter'). Partially completed rows will not receive full points.
A maximum of 8/8 points is available for this route.
OR
NOT APPLICABLE ROUTE)
'Climate change' NOT selected in column 'Environmental issue' in any row - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) For 행 여기서 '기후변화' is 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈': 열 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, 리스크, 및 기회 are covered by the 프로세스 for this 환경 이슈' 그리고 '가치사슬 stages covered' 완료해야 합니다 to be 획득 가능 for 공시 점. 점수가 부여됩니다 per 완성된 칸(셀) in proportion to the number of 행 공개 (제외 열 ‘Have you validated your 프로세스 for SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess'?' 및 ‘SBTN Step 1 ‘Assess' official validation letter'). 부분적으로 완성된 행은 최고점을 받을 수 없습니다. 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 8/8점입니다. 또는 NOT APPLICABLE 경로) '기후변화' NOT 선택 in 열 '환경 이슈' in 하나 이상 행 - 0/0 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/0점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
For rows where 'Climate change' is selected in column 'Environmental issue':
Both 'Risks' AND 'Opportunities' must be selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' in any row to be eligible for Awareness points. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
i) All of the following met in any complete row - 2 points
'Risks' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered...' AND
Any option excluding 'Not defined' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' AND
Any option excluding any 'Other, please specify' option selected in column 'Tools and methods used' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered' AND
Any of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered':
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'
- 'Poor coordination between regulatory bodies'
- 'Poor enforcement of environmental regulation'
- ‘Protected area designation'
- ‘Regulation of noise pollution'
Reputation
- ‘Exclusion of vulnerable and marginalized stakeholders (e.g., informal workers)'
- 'Impact on human health'
- 'Increased concern and/or negative feedback from partners and stakeholders'
- 'Negative press coverage related to support of projects or activities with negative impacts on the environment (e.g. GHG emissions, deforestation & conversion, water stress, excessive bycatch)'
- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'
- 'Rupture of tailings dams'
- 'Storm (including blizzards, dust, and sandstorms)'
- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- ‘Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- ‘Transition to bio-based chemicals'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
ii) All of the following met in any complete row - 2 points
'Opportunities' selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered...' AND
Any option excluding 'Not defined' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' AND
Any option excluding any 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Tools and methods used' AND
Any option excluding 'Other, please specify' selected in column 'Partners and stakeholders considered'.
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.

criteria.criteria:
The following conditions must be met to be eligible for Management points:
- 'Climate change' selected in column 'Environmental issue' in at least one row
- Full Awareness points awarded
If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in the same row, then all of the following criteria must be met in that one row. If 'Risks' and 'Opportunities' are disclosed in separate rows, then all of the following criteria must be met in both rows.
For criteria i) to v), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Risks' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
i) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
ii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
iii) At least three of the following selected in column 'Risk types and criteria considered' which cover at least three risk types - 0.5 points
(Please note: the risk types appear as headers in the 'Risk types and criteria considered' column.)
Policy
- 'Carbon pricing mechanisms'
- 'Changes to international law and bilateral agreements'
- 'Changes to national legislation'
- 'Increased difficulty in obtaining operations permits'
- 'Lack of mature certification and sustainability standards'

- 'Stigmatization of sector'
Acute physical risks
- 'Avalanche'
- 'Cold wave/frost'
- 'Cyclones, hurricanes, typhoons'
- ‘Disease or pests'
- 'Drought'
- 'Flood (coastal, fluvial, pluvial, ground water)'
- 'Glacial lake outburst'
- 'Heat waves'
- 'Heavy precipitation (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- ‘Invasive species'
- 'Landslide'
- ‘Pollution incident'

- 'Subsidence'
- 'Tornado'
- 'Wildfires'
Chronic physical risks
- 'Change in land/freshwater/ocean-use'
- 'Changing precipitation patterns and types (rain, hail, snow/ice)'
- 'Changing temperature (air, freshwater, marine water)'
- 'Changing wind patterns'
- 'Coastal erosion'
- ‘Declining ecosystem services'
- ‘Declining water quality'
- ‘Groundwater depletion
- 'Heat stress'
- ‘Increased ecosystem vulnerability'
- ‘Increased levels of macro or microplastic leakage to air, soil, freshwater and/or marine bodies'
- 'Increased severity of extreme weather events'
- 'Ocean acidification'
- ‘Operations in or adjacent to areas important for biodiversity'
- 'Overexploitation of species'
- 'Permafrost thawing'
- 'Precipitation or hydrological variability'
- 'Sea level rise'
- ‘Seasonal supply variability'
- 'Soil degradation'
- 'Soil erosion'
- 'Solifluction'
- 'Temperature variability'
- 'Water availability at a basin/catchment level'
- 'Water stress'
- 'Water quality at a basin/catchment level'
Technology
- 'Dependency on water-intensive energy sources'
- 'Lack of access to data or monitoring systems'
- ‘Limited access to drought-resistant crop varieties'
- 'Limited access to soil conservation and other sustainable techniques'
- ‘Transition to bio-based chemicals'
- 'Transition to lower emissions technology and products'
- 'Transition to water intensive, low carbon energy sources'
- 'Unsuccessful investment in new technologies'
Market
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of certified sustainable material'
- 'Lack of availability and/or increased cost of raw materials'
- 'Changing customer behavior'
- 'Uncertainty in market signals'
Liability
- 'Exposure to sanctions and litigation'
- 'Non-compliance with regulations and legislation'
iv) At least two of the following selected in column 'Tools and methods used' - 0.5 points
Enterprise Risk Management
-‘COSO Enterprise Risk Management Framework'
-‘Enterprise Risk Management'
-‘ISO 31000 Risk Management'
-‘Risk models'
-‘Stress tests'
International methodologies and standards
-‘Environmental Impact Assessment'
-‘IPCC Climate Change Projections'
-‘ISO 14001 Environmental Management Systems'
-‘ISO 59004 Circular Economy'
-‘Life Cycle Assessment'
-‘PACTA - Paris Agreement Capital Transition Assessment'
Databases
-‘GBIF - Global Biodiversity Information Facility'
-‘IUCN Red List of Ecosystems'
-‘Nation-specific databases, tools, or standards, please specify'
-‘Protected Planet'
-‘Regional government databases, please specify'
Commercially/publicly available tools
-‘BFC - Biodiversity Footprint Calculator'
-‘BFM - Biodiversity Footprint Methodology'
-‘BIM - Biodiversity Impact Metric'
-‘Biological Diversity Protocol'
-‘Bioscope'
-‘BISI - Biodiversity Indicators for Site-based impacts'
-‘BNGC - Biodiversity Net Gain Calculator'
-‘CBD - ‘Convention on Biological Diversity'
-‘CBF - Corporate Biodiversity Footprint'
- ‘Circulytics'
-‘Collect Earth'
-‘EcoVadis'
-‘ENCORE'
-‘IBAT - Integrated Biodiversity Assessment Tool'
-‘LEAP (Locate, Evaluate, Assess and Prepare) approach, TNFD'
-‘ReCiPe'
-‘SEDEX'
-‘WBCSD Corporate Ecosystem Services Review'
-‘WWF Biodiversity Risk Filter'
Other
-‘Desk-based research'
-‘Jurisdictional/landscape assessment'
-‘Materiality assessment'
-‘Partner and stakeholder consultation/analysis'
-‘Scenario analysis'
v) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
For criteria vi) to ix), points will be awarded for a completed row where 'Opportunities' is selected in column 'Indicate which of dependencies, impacts, risks, and opportunities are covered by the process...' as follows:
vi) Either 'More than once a year' OR 'Annually' selected in column 'Frequency of assessment' - 0.5 points
vii) All of the following selected in column 'Time horizons covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Short-term'
- 'Medium-term'
- 'Long-term'
viii) At least two options in column 'Tools and methods used' selected excluding the following - 0.5 points
- 'Other enterprise risk management, please specify'
- 'Internal company methods'
- 'Other international methodologies and standards, please specify'
- 'Other databases, please specify'
- 'Other, please specify'
- 'Other commercially/publicly available tools, please specify'
ix) All of the following selected in column 'Value chain stage covered' - 0.5 points
- 'Direct operations'
- 'Upstream value chain'
- 'Downstream value chain'
A maximum of 4.5/4.5 points is available for this question.
Best row(s) scored.
